# Results

This folder contains output files generated by the notebooks.  
Run the notebooks in order (01 → 04) to reproduce all results.

## Generated Files

| File | Generated by | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `01_eda_overview.png` | Notebook 01 | Spatial + temporal EDA plots |
| `02_kdistance_graphs.png` | Notebook 02 | Spatial and temporal k-distance graphs |
| `02_final_clustering.png` | Notebook 02 | Final ST-DBSCAN clustering map |
| `parameter_sweep_results.csv` | Notebook 02 | Outlier rate across 8 parameter combos |
| `clustering_evaluation_metrics.csv` | Notebook 02 | Silhouette, DBCV, compactness per algorithm |
| `03_prototype_comparison.png` | Notebook 03 | Visual comparison of prototype strategies |
| `classifier_accuracy_summary.csv` | Notebook 03 | XGBoost vs RF accuracy table |
| `rules_random_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All anchor rules — random prototypes |
| `rules_random_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules (precision ≥ 0.9) |
| `rules_kdtree_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All anchor rules — KD-Tree prototypes |
| `rules_kdtree_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules (precision ≥ 0.9) |
| `rules_isoforest_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All anchor rules — Isolation Forest |
| `rules_isoforest_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules (precision ≥ 0.9) |
| `rule_evaluation_metrics.csv` | Notebook 04 | Aggregate rule quality summary |
| `04_bounding_boxes_kdtree.png` | Notebook 04 | Cluster bounding boxes + prototypes |
